grant_title: Local Agriculture and Seafood Act (LASA) Grants Program
project_area: Growth, development, and marketing of local food and seafood
demographic_requirements: Projects must support local agriculture and seafood industries in Rhode Island
eligibility_summary: Open to Rhode Island-based farmers, fishermen, food producers, aquaculture operators, local food businesses, non-profits, and tribal entities working to enhance local food and seafood systems.
